description_long: This is a modern, single-seat armchair with a boxy silhouette and a deep, cushioned seat. The chair features a high, slightly reclined backrest and thick, padded armrests on both sides, providing ample comfort and support. Its upholstery appears to be made of smooth, dark leather or faux leather, giving it a sleek and sophisticated look suitable for urban environments. The chair is supported by four slender, straight metal legs, which elevate it slightly off the ground and add a touch of minimalism. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments. This chair would fit well in a city apartment, office lobby, or modern public waiting area.
description: A modern, dark leather armchair with thick cushions, armrests, and four slim metal legs. Its sleek, boxy design is both comfortable and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, high backrest, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the thickness of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, padded backrest and the two rear legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest and seat depth.
